title: FAREX 2027 — Feria Artesanal y Empresarial
venue: Centro de Convenciones Cartagena de Indias
venue_name: Centro de Convenciones Cartagena de Indias
organizer: FAREX / Camara de Comercio de Cartagena
description: La feria artesanal mas importante del Caribe colombiano. Tradicion, cultura y emprendimiento reunen a mas de 250 expositores de moda, artesanias, decoracion y marroquineria. Entrada libre.
description_en: The most important artisan fair in the Colombian Caribbean. Tradition, culture, and entrepreneurship bring together over 250 exhibitors of fashion, handicrafts, decoration, and leather goods. Free entry.
